name: The Back Nine Golf | Panama City Beach, FL

faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site, though bringing your own clubs is also permitted.

faq.answer: The venue offers on-site food and bar services, though outside food and drink policies are not specified.

faq.answer: Standard simulation time for 18 holes typically ranges from 1-2 hours depending on simulator settings and group size.
